sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11684" key="a)peidopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπειδοποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n11684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">construct according to a pattern, Inscr.Milet.</tr_> (Haussoullier<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg011.perseus-grc1:p.163" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.163</biblScope> </bibl>), in form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπειδοποιήθη;</foreign> but more prob. from <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπεδοποιέω</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make flat, smooth,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατεξέσθη τὸ ὑπέρθυρον καὶ ἀ.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
